narrative:
Dover City has 7,927 registered voters, with 55.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.3%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.2 percentage points.
